# pheno-errors

> Canonical `AppError` enum + `AppResult<T>` alias for the pheno-*
> substrate fleet. Consolidates the 5 most-common error patterns
> (`Domain`, `NotFound`, `Conflict`, `Validation`, `Storage`) into a
> single, dependency-light crate that every L1/L2/L3 pheno-* repo
> can depend on without pulling in the rest of the shared-crate
> surface.

## Public API

```rust
use pheno_errors::{AppError, AppResult};

#[derive(Debug, thiserror::Error)]
pub enum AppError {
    #[error("domain error: {0}")]
    Domain(String),
    #[error("not found: {entity} {id}")]
    NotFound { entity: String, id: String },
    #[error("conflict: {0}")]
    Conflict(String),
    #[error("validation error: {0}")]
    Validation(String),
    #[error("storage error: {0}")]
    Storage(String),
}

pub type AppResult<T> = Result<T, AppError>;

// Convenience constructors + boundary From impls:
//   AppError::domain / not_found / conflict / validation / storage
//   impl From<std::io::Error> for AppError    → Storage
//   impl From<&'static str>  for AppError    → Domain
//   impl From<String>        for AppError    → Domain
//   impl From<anyhow::Error> for AppError    → Domain (walks .chain())
```

## Quickstart

```toml
# Cargo.toml
[dependencies]
pheno-errors = "0.1"
anyhow = "1"
```

```rust
use pheno_errors::{AppError, AppResult};
fn load() -> AppResult<String> { Err(AppError::not_found("user", "42")) }
```

## Conventions

- Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, `docs:`, `refactor:`).
- rustfmt + clippy (`-D warnings`); `#![warn(missing_docs)]` on the
  public API.
- 80% lib coverage gate (ADR-040); see `llvm-cov.toml` and the
  `coverage` job in `.github/workflows/ci.yml`.
- Closed 5-variant `enum` (no `#[non_exhaustive]`) so consumer
  `match` exhaustiveness checks are useful.
- `thiserror` for `Display` + `Error` derives; no `anyhow` boundary
  inside the crate itself.
- Inline unit tests in `src/lib.rs`; integration tests in
  `tests/smoke.rs` (one per variant + cross-variant exhaustiveness
  tripwire).
- Standalone crate (empty `[workspace]` table in `Cargo.toml`); not
  a member of the root monorepo workspace.

## See also

- `src/lib.rs` — module docs explaining the 5 variants and the
  `anyhow` interop contract.
- `tests/smoke.rs` — 5 integration tests + 1 tripwire test.
- `AGENTS.md` — agent context.
- `WORKLOG.md` — change history (v2.1 schema).
- `CHANGELOG.md` — release notes.
- `LICENSE-MIT` / `LICENSE-APACHE` — dual license.
- Sibling: `pheno-config` (typed config), `pheno-context` (request
  context), `pheno-flags` (feature flags).
